name: gemiflow-intelligence
description: User-facing surface for GemiFlow's self-learning system: 6 neural_* + 10 hooks_intelligence_* + 9 routing/meta hooks + 4 SONA/MicroLoRA tools (29 total). Implements the 4-step pipeline (RETRIEVE → JUDGE → DISTILL → CONSOLIDATE) and IPFS-based cross-project pattern transfer.
